scope: Campaign message and localStorage result application
Desktop QA only; mobile is outside the current target
flow: Objective alert action: 視界点奪回
observations: Battle alert showed 視界点: 観測点沈黙 and action 視界点奪回.
After Action showed 目標イベント対応 entries for 第4戦列歩兵大隊, 東方辺境猟兵隊, and 第2工兵中隊.
Each visible assessment read 観測点沈黙に対応、未回復（支配0%）.
Per-unit rows showed 目標イベント 視界地点/林縁観測丘 / 観測点沈黙 / 未回復.
Next-battle preview showed 次戦教訓 目標イベント対応1件 / 即応+2.
After applying the result, the campaign advanced to 第2戦略ターン and the top message retained the first objective-event response summary.
